demos.title: Case 1: NeuroMark Schizophrenia Multiverse Analysis
demos.description: Leading case report on multiverse analysis using NeuroMark 2.2 functional network connectivity from schizophrenia patients and controls.
demos.primary_prompt: Review the curated PDF case report: Multiverse analysis using NeuroMark 2.2 functional network connectivity from schizophrenia patients and controls.
demos.report_title: Multiverse analysis using NeuroMark 2.2 functional network connectivity from schizophrenia patients and controls

demos.title: Case 2: Cocaine Network Segregation Robustness
demos.description: Case report on multiverse robustness of resting-state network segregation in cocaine use disorder.
demos.primary_prompt: Review the curated PDF case report: Multiverse Robustness of Resting-State Network Segregation in Cocaine Use Disorder.
demos.report_title: Multiverse Robustness of Resting-State Network Segregation in Cocaine Use Disorder

demos.title: Case 3: Connectome Hubness and Decoding
demos.description: Case report on high-dimensional connectome matrices, hubness, decoding, and generative fidelity.
demos.primary_prompt: Review the curated PDF case report: High-Dimensional Connectome Matrices: Hubness, Decoding, and Generative Fidelity.
demos.report_title: High-Dimensional Connectome Matrices: Hubness, Decoding, and Generative Fidelity

demos.title: Case 4: Ingroup-Outgroup Cultural Boundaries
demos.description: Case report on ingroup-outgroup boundaries across cultures and a unified neural architecture.
demos.primary_prompt: Review the curated PDF case report: Ingroup-Outgroup Boundaries Across Cultures: A Unified Neural Architecture.
demos.report_title: Ingroup-Outgroup Boundaries Across Cultures: A Unified Neural Architecture

demos.title: Bounded Self-Evolving Research: Discovery
demos.description: Bounded autoresearch discovery case report using TRIBE stimulus discovery as the worked example.
demos.primary_prompt: Review the curated PDF case report: TRIBE Stimulus Discovery as a Bounded Autoresearch Case Study.
demos.report_title: TRIBE Stimulus Discovery as a Bounded Autoresearch Case Study

demos.title: Bounded Self-Evolving Research: Predictive
demos.description: Bounded autoresearch predictive case report on calibrated resting-state functional connectivity prediction of HCP behavioral components.
demos.primary_prompt: Review the curated PDF case report: Calibrated rs-FC Prediction of HCP Behavioral Components.
demos.report_title: Calibrated rs-FC Prediction of HCP Behavioral Components
